title: Usopp Challenges Luffy
description: The argument over the Merry becomes a painful split between captain and crewmate, cutting deeper than any normal fight.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji, Usopp. The argument over the Merry becomes a painful split between captain and crewmate, cutting deeper than any normal fight.
